notes: This is a build-ready skeleton for n8n, not a fully exported production workflow.

parameters.jsCode:
const body = $json.body;
return [{ json: {
  invocation_id: body.invocation_id,
  workflow_key: body.workflow_key,
  objective: body.objective,
  template_key: body.payload.template_key || null,
  template_id: body.payload.template_id || null,
  title: body.payload.title,
  data: body.payload.data || {},
  target_folder: body.payload.target_folder || null,
  document_type: body.payload.document_type || 'tai lieu',
  reviewers: body.reviewers || [],
  callback_url: body.callback.url,
  callback_token: body.callback.token || null,
  context: body.context || {},
  status: body.payload.status || 'draft',
  version: body.payload.version || 'v1'
} }];

parameters.content: Implement with Google Drive search/create nodes. Input: target_folder.folder_path. Output: target_folder_id, target_folder_path
If reviewers.length > 0, add Google Drive permissions nodes here. Default permission_mode=commenter

parameters.jsCode:
return [{ json: {
  invocation_id: $json.invocation_id,
  workflow_key: 'docs.from-template.v1',
  status: 'completed',
  generated_title: $json.title,
  file_id: $json.id || null,
  file_type: 'gdoc',
  file_url: $json.webViewLink || null,
  folder_id: ($json.target_folder && $json.target_folder.folder_id) || null,
  folder_path: ($json.target_folder && $json.target_folder.folder_path) || null,
  generation_mode: 'template_based',
  document_type: $json.document_type,
  reviewer_emails: $json.reviewers || [],
  permission_mode: ($json.reviewers || []).length ? 'commenter' : null,
  output_summary: 'Google Doc da duoc tao tu template.',
  completed_at: new Date().toISOString()
} }];
